proposal.hypothesis: A smaller, more strongly regularized residual should retain any quality benefit while preventing delayed posture and drift regressions.
proposal.expectedEffect: Preserve every previously passing gate and lower normalized violation severity, especially delayed body jerk, slip, and contact impact.
